### jekyll 支持代码高亮种类

- console
- conf
- json
- python
- shell
- http
- javascript

Ref.
 - [supported languages](https://github.com/rouge-ruby/rouge/wiki/List-of-supported-languages-and-lexers)


### POST 页面编辑

1. 启用 latex

`math: true`

2. 置顶文章

`pin: true`

3. 启用 Toc

`toc: true`


```
---
title: helloworld
author: 2hanx
date: 2020-08-08 11:33:00 +0800
categories: [Crypto]
tags: [typography]
math: true
pin: true
toc: true
image: /assets/img/sample/devices-mockup.png
---
```
